name: Popcorn Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together popped corn and nuts.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, and margarine. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Continue boiling for 10 to 15 minutes until the mixture turns light caramel in color.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the popcorn and nuts.
5. Spread out on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
6. Break apart when cool. Optionally, dip or spread with chocolate.
Makes about 40 pieces.
